name: Supabase
purpose: Postgres database, row-level security, object storage
data_exposure: All client records — encrypted at rest, RLS-isolated

name: Clerk
purpose: Identity provider — authentication, MFA, and organization/user management
data_exposure: User identity and session data (names, emails, auth tokens); no client business records

name: Render
purpose: Compute service hosting (valuation, report and PDF rendering, webhooks)
data_exposure: Transient request/response only; no client data stored at rest

name: Vercel
data_exposure: Serves the browser app; no client data at rest (transient request/response)

name: Stripe
purpose: Subscription billing and payments for advisor firms
data_exposure: Firm billing and payment data; no client assessment records
attestation: PCI DSS Level 1; SOC 2 Type II

name: Anthropic
purpose: AI narrative drafted from already-structured data
data_exposure: Report inputs only; never trains on data; never computes or influences a score
